name: Homepage
description: A highly customisable dashboard. Auto-configured to link all your apps.

steps.instruction: Homepage auto-discovers your HomeStack services — no manual configuration needed. All your apps should appear with their status, widgets, and links

To customize: edit the files in your CONFIG_DIR/homepage/ folder. services.yaml controls the layout, widgets.yaml adds dashboard widgets, settings.yaml controls theme and appearance. Changes take effect on page refresh
Bookmark this page — it's your homelab dashboard. Access it at http://YOUR_SERVER_IP:3000 from any device on your network
